response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and direct exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X; their background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript environments with no evidence of embedded firmware or switch product development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and contribute to open-source tools
Excellent communication and workshop facilitation skills
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C in embedded UNIX environments
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency (critical requirement)
No evidence of embedded networking, switch firmware, or security protocol implementation
